title: Meta to layoff 8,000 from its workforce, amid AI spending push: Report
description: Meta is set to lay off around 8,000 employees globally as it looks to streamline operations and offset rising investments in artificial intelligence.
content: As part of the first wave of its job cuts this year, Meta Platforms is planning to cut 8,000 employees. The layoffs are seemingly an effort to boost efficiency and reportedly to make up for the company’s massive spending on artificial intelligence (A... [339 chars]

title: OpenAI says new model adept at making AI better
description: OpenAI released a new model it touts as its best yet for handling research work like making improved versions of itself, as rapid-fire releases by AI rivals pick up pace. According to OpenAI, artificial general intelligence in which computers think as well or better than people is no longer theoretical, and AI models that research how to essentially improve themselves take the world further in that direction.

title: Trump administration vows crackdown on Chinese companies 'exploiting' AI models made in US
description: America is taking a strong stance against foreign tech firms, especially those in China, for allegedly stealing advanced artificial intelligence technology. The U.S. government plans to identify and penalize companies that extract capabilities from American AI systems. This move comes as China rapidly closes the gap in AI development. Lawmakers are also supporting measures to protect U.S.

title: Musk Is Chasing the Smart AI Money With $60 Billion Deal
description: One of the most fundamental ingredients of Silicon Valley success is the practice of dominating a market to rapidly achieve massive scale. The strategy has a name, blitzscaling, coined by billionaire venture capitalist Reid Hoffman, and it has created unfathomable wealth for companies in social media, ride-hailing and streaming. But not so much artificial intelligence.

title: Meta to cut 10% of global workforce, and this is what the severance pay looks like
description: Meta is preparing sweeping layoffs affecting thousands of employees as it focuses on artificial intelligence. In the memo, the company has outlined severance packages, healthcare support, and transition assistance for impacted workers amid growing uncertainty across its global workforce.
content:
The cost of chasing the AI future is becoming clearer at Meta.
The company is set to cut roughly 10 per cent of its global workforce, impacting around 8,000 employees, as it pours billions into artificial intelligence and restructures its operations.... [2906 chars]
